  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
  2. Response

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.Response

Packages that use Response
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides classes related to web grounding and RAG.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the core domain model for Anahata's context management system.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.

    The last response received from the model.

    Agi.getLastResponse()

  • Uses of Response in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider with type parameters of type Response
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    StreamObserver<R extends Response<?>>
    A simple interface for observing a stream of values, typically used for asynchronous token streaming from an AI model.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider that return Response
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract Response
    AbstractModel.generateContent(GenerationRequest request)
    The core method for interacting with an AI model.
    Method parameters in uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider with type arguments of type Response
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract void
    AbstractModel.generateContentStream(GenerationRequest request, StreamObserver<Response<? extends AbstractModelMessage>> observer)
    Generates content asynchronously using token streaming.
